description: The luxe comfort and rugged styling of woodland's shoes are now replicated in its sandals. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style.UpperCriss-crossing leather straps across the midfoot and forefootRivet embellishments on the upper for styleCushioned footbed with plush leather OutsoleDurable rubber outsole with multi-directional textured lugs for absolute grip and traction on various surfacesshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
